pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which generates the starter notebook at this path and task instructions.
Confirmed via task instructions and export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path for the JSON output.
Confirmed via task instructions and export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path for the CSV output.
Confirmed via task instructions and export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path for the plot output.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which verifies the presence of this HDF5 dataset before generating the ground truth.
Confirmed via verifier.py which retrieves 'tolerance_pct' from the metadata and defaults to 2.0 (divided by 100 for checking percentages).

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real-world San Francisco UrbanSim dataset (sanfran_public.h5) sourced from the official UDST GitHub repository. All expected file paths (notebook, JSON, CSV, PNG) precisely match the requirements in the setup and export scripts. The tolerance for distance calculation accuracy is confirmed to be 2.0%.
